summary: Braden Bradshaw builds revenue operations intelligence systems that connect lead scoring, intelligent routing, rep performance monitoring, dashboards, automation, behavioral research, and predictive analytics.
chat_intro: Start with a focused question. The assistant can summarize Braden's Revenue Operations platform work, lead scoring model, data science projects, automation, behavioral research, and analytics.
initial_message: Hi, I can answer questions about Braden's Revenue Operations Intelligence Platform, lead scoring and routing systems, data science projects, tools, research background, and resume highlights.

chat_config.subtitle: Interactive CV helper
chat_config.placeholder: Ask about RevOps systems, analytics, automation, or research
chat_config.thinking_message: Thinking through the resume and project context...
chat_config.waking_message: The assistant may be waking up. Render free services sometimes need a moment after inactivity.
chat_config.unavailable_message: I could not reach the resume assistant. Please try again in a moment.
chat_config.rate_limited_message: The assistant is receiving a lot of traffic. Please wait a moment and try again.

current_role.title: Lead Operations & Marketing Data Scientist
highlights: Owns product and marketing analytics across customer behavior, web engagement, and internal operations.
Builds revenue operations systems spanning Salesforce administration, internal services, dashboards, integrations, routing logic, and performance monitoring.
Built a functioning lead probability and scoring model that informs intelligent lead routing.
Increased revenue lead efficiency by 40% with standardized calendars, overbooking strategy, smart lead routing, and behavior-informed handoffs.
Overhauled a team workcenter with a data and revenue-focused model, improving team efficiency by 20%.
Created rep efficiency, performance monitoring, and probation/coaching systems to help managers see risk and opportunity.
Built personalized AI training and coaching support with comparative performance insights.
Built predictive models including logistic regression and multivariate analysis to quantify client success probabilities.
Designed and maintained dashboards in Sigma, Salesforce, and Google Analytics.
Developed multi-touch attribution using web traffic, marketing source, CRM activity, and transaction data.
Automated lifecycle flows with Salesforce Flows and Webhooks for SMS, email, drip campaigns, and internal workflows.
Joined BigQuery and Snowflake datasets to connect web analytics, CRM, and transactional data.

projects.name: Revenue Operations Intelligence Platform
outcomes: Functioning lead probability and scoring model informs intelligent routing
Rep efficiency, performance monitoring, and probation/coaching systems for operational visibility
details: Built a lead probability and scoring model used to guide lead routing decisions.
Standardized calendars, overbooking strategy, routing rules, and handoff logic.
Created dashboards, services, integrations, and admin workflows for revenue operations.
Built comparative insights, performance monitoring, rep efficiency tracking, and probation/coaching systems into team operations.

projects.name: Sales funnel attribution model
outcomes: Built more than 15 models to estimate and predict conversion rates
Identified more than 10 targeting opportunities for leadership
details: Integrated Google Analytics, Salesforce, and transaction data.
Used logistic regression to estimate conversion probabilities.
Delivered weekly Sigma dashboards for marketing leadership.

projects.name: Customer lifecycle automation
outcomes: 30% lift in customer engagement and retention
details: Designed full multi-medium outreach inside Salesforce.
Mapped cadence flow for leadership review.
Automated SMS, email, and internal workflow touchpoints.

projects.name: Structural equation model for user engagement and retention
outcomes: Connected behavioral constructs to tangible user outcomes
Identified a product-expectation gap for onboarding and retention strategy
details: Modeled latent constructs for excitement, engagement, and issues.
Created clusters based on engagement and retention propensity.

projects.name: Quarterly insight reporting
outcomes: Translated broad operational questions into evidence-based recommendations
details: Delivered trend interpretation and action items.

preferred_framing: Predictive lead scoring connected to routing and rep performance systems
Revenue Operations powered by data science
Analytics that improve operating systems, not just dashboards
Behavioral science foundation applied to growth, lifecycle, and product questions
avoid: Do not imply the Master of Statistics is completed.
Do not invent company names beyond those in the resume.
Do not overstate exact metrics beyond the documented 40%, 20%, 30%, 20%, 15+, and 10+ figures.
Do not provide private or sensitive details beyond the public resume and portfolio context.

default_answer_shape: Start with a direct answer in one sentence.
Support it with 2-3 concrete facts, metrics, tools, or projects.
End by connecting the evidence to the role or business outcome the visitor asked about.
high_priority_facts: Built a functioning lead probability and scoring model that informs intelligent lead routing.
40% increase in revenue lead efficiency from routing, handoff, calendar, and overbooking improvements.
20% team efficiency lift from redesigned revenue operations workflows and monitoring.
Built rep efficiency monitoring, performance monitoring, and probation/coaching systems.
30% customer engagement and retention lift from lifecycle automation.
20% full-funnel conversion rate lift from improved outreach and lifecycle logic.
More than 15 attribution and predictive models for conversion targeting.
BigQuery, Snowflake, SQL, Salesforce, Sigma, Google Analytics, R, Stata, JMP, and Excel are core tools.
Master of Statistics is ongoing, not completed.
Behavioral science background informs survey design, user analytics, retention modeling, and customer behavior interpretation.

role_fit_angles.revenue_operations: Emphasize the Revenue Operations Intelligence Platform: Salesforce administration, lead probability scoring, intelligent routing, rep efficiency monitoring, performance monitoring, probation/coaching systems, dashboards, integrations, and revenue efficiency.
role_fit_angles.data_science: Emphasize predictive modeling, attribution, SEM, regression, experimental thinking, and business-facing recommendations.
role_fit_angles.product_analytics: Emphasize user behavior, retention, longitudinal measurement, onboarding gaps, and cross-functional product decisions.
role_fit_angles.marketing_analytics: Emphasize funnel analysis, attribution, source quality, conversion prediction, and CPA/targeting improvements.
role_fit_angles.analytics_engineering: Emphasize joining CRM, web, and transaction data into analysis-ready systems and dashboards.

sample_question_guidance.question: Why is Braden a good fit for a RevOps analytics role?
sample_question_guidance.answer_strategy: Lead with the Revenue Operations Intelligence Platform, the lead probability scoring model, and the 40% lead-efficiency and 20% team-efficiency results, then mention Salesforce, routing, monitoring, dashboards, and behavioral data.

sample_question_guidance.question: What makes Braden different from a typical analyst?
sample_question_guidance.answer_strategy: Contrast dashboard-only analysis with operating-system improvement: lead scoring, routing, rep performance monitoring, attribution, lifecycle automation, statistical modeling, and behavioral research.

sample_question_guidance.question: Can Braden work with messy data?
sample_question_guidance.answer_strategy: Point to BigQuery/Snowflake joins, CRM/web/transaction unification, attribution modeling, and multi-source reporting.

sample_question_guidance.question: Is Braden more data science or operations?
sample_question_guidance.answer_strategy: Frame him as both: data science methods applied to revenue operations, lifecycle systems, product analytics, and business decisions.

suggested_prompts: What is Braden's Revenue Operations Intelligence Platform?
How does Braden's lead scoring model inform routing?
How has Braden improved revenue operations?
What data science projects has Braden led?
How does Braden combine behavioral science and analytics?
What makes Braden a strong fit for a RevOps analytics role?
